top_signals.title: Coinbase secures UK authorization to offer traditional investments alongside crypto
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: FSCS Annual Report and Accounts and Class Statements 2025/26
top_signals.summary: In its Annual Report and Accounts and Class Statements published today (Thursday 2 July, 2026), the Financial Services Compensation Scheme (FSCS) outlines the vital work it has carried out during the past financial year.

top_signals.title: U.S. International Trade in Goods and Services, April 2026
top_signals.summary: The U.S. monthly international trade deficit decreased in April 2026 according to the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis and the U.S. Census Bureau. The deficit decreased from $56.6 billion in March (revised) to $55.9 billion in April, as exports increased more than imports. The goods deficit decreased $2.4 billion in April to $83.7 billion. The services surplus decreased $1.7 billion in April to $27.8 billion. Full Text
